decisions.decision: Fix sys.path in _graph_impact_section() so blast-radius works in automated review
decisions.rationale: Import fails with 'No module named scripts' because root is not on sys.path. Same pattern already used at lines 545 and 1913 in same file.

decisions.decision: Add graph auto-index to /plan workflow via staleness check
decisions.rationale: Planners benefit from graph context (coupling, communities) for partitioning work. Check if graph.db exists and is stale before plan starts.

decisions.decision: Add synchronous PostCommit hook for incremental graph re-indexing
decisions.rationale: Triple trigger design from CONTEXT.md. Synchronous ensures graph is always fresh. Incremental reindex is fast (only changed files via hash tracking).

decisions.decision: Synchronous reindex on PostCommit (not stale-marker, not background)
decisions.rationale: User preference. Incremental reindex is fast enough (~1-3s) to run inline. Avoids stale-graph edge cases.

constraints: Must not break existing hooks or workflow commands
PostCommit hook must be idempotent (safe to run multiple times)
Graph import fix must follow existing sys.path pattern in workflow_checks_core.py
